flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Nebraska at Omaha fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of Nebraska at Omaha rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (69.2% → 77.9%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Nebraska at Omaha are 11% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($53.9k vs $48.6k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Nebraska at Omaha rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (24.6% → 27.2%).
